name: IPSAE
description: Scoring function for interprotein interactions in AlphaFold2 and Boltz.
capabilities: Scoring function for interprotein interactions in AlphaFold2 and Boltz

complex_structure.description: Predicted protein complex structure in PDB format (from AlphaFold2 or Boltz)

chain_a.description: Chain ID of the first interacting protein

chain_b.description: Chain ID of the second interacting protein
